title: Simple Delight
description: A simplistic texture pack with perfect balance between default and barebones
body:
## Simple Delight
**Simple Delight is a simplistic texture pack that changes the game textures to make you feel a truly _Simple_ experience. Please note that the pack is still in beta and that it's being made by a solo dev, so textures are due to change.**

**If you wish to give a hand or simply make a difference in the texture pack, feel free to join the Discord Server!**

![The Banner of Simple Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f56896dc68c5ecc3664c3832a6481cddd18d6582_0.webp)
